atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain for the past three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies a specific injury or trauma.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports using acetaminophen with limited relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that the pain is constant.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain worsens with overhead activities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies recently using icing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies having tried physical therapy previously.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals limited active and passive range of motion in the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the greater tuberosity elicits tenderness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Capillary refill is less than three seconds in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Sensation to light touch is intact.

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Radiographic examination demonstrates no fractures or bony abnormalities.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes acetaminophen as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a referral to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI of the left shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in four weeks to assess progress.
